executive_title: Radar Diario de IA - Herramientas, Modelos y Frameworks
intro_message: Últimas novedades sobre herramientas y modelos de inteligencia artificial.
opening_message: Este informe destaca las herramientas, modelos y características más recientes en el mundo de la inteligencia artificial.

items.title: Claude’s consumer growth surge continues after Pentagon deal debacle
items.summary: Claude's app is now seeing more new installs than ChatGPT and is growing its daily active users.

items.title: Scaling AI opportunity across the globe: Learnings from GitHub and Andela
items.summary: Developers connected to Andela share how they’re learning AI tools inside real production workflows.

items.title: Luma launches creative AI agents powered by its new ‘Unified Intelligence’ models
items.summary: Luma introduced Luma Agents, powered by its new “Unified Intelligence” models, designed to generate end-to-end creative work across text, images, video and audio.

items.title: DiligenceSquared uses AI, voice agents to make M&A research affordable
items.summary: This startup uses AI voice agents to conduct interviews with customers, making M&A research more affordable.

items.title: Anthropic’s Claude found 22 vulnerabilities in Firefox over two weeks
items.summary: In a recent security partnership with Mozilla, Anthropic's Claude found 22 separate vulnerabilities in Firefox.

items.title: OpenAI delays ChatGPT’s ‘adult mode’ again
items.summary: The feature will give verified adult users access to erotica and other adult content, but has been delayed again.
